title: Design a retry and timeout policy
description: Choose per-dependency timeouts, retryable error classes, backoff parameters, and an overall deadline budget.
body: Steps: 1. Set a per-call timeout shorter than the caller's deadline. 2. Enumerate which errors are retryable (timeout, 503, reset) vs terminal (4xx, validation). 3. Pick base, cap, and max attempts; use full jitter. 4. Enforce a total deadline budget across attempts so retries cannot exceed the caller's SLA. 5. Add circuit-breaking when failure rate is high. Rollback point: revert to no-retry single call. Validation: tests assert terminal errors are not retried, attempts stop at the cap, and the deadline budget is honored.
